crm.get_customer.reason: customer records contain PII; strip before the LLM sees them

admin.reason: admins are cleared to see raw customer PII

search.docs.reason: public documentation search, no sensitive data

web.fetch.reason: public web fetch; but marks the session as tainted

http.post.reason: outbound HTTP; allowed only while the session is clean

db.execute_sql.reason: read-only analytics access; unbounded queries are capped

constraints.reason: only read-only SELECT statements are permitted for agent identities

logs.tail.reason: raw logs may contain secrets; result withheld from the model and flagged for review

admin.delete_user.reason: destructive admin action requires a human to sign off

sequence_rules.reason: outbound POST is forbidden after reading customer PII in the same session (exfiltration guard)
